properties.displayName: Deploy SQL Managed Instance Auditing to CSTRM Eventhub
properties.description: Enables the Audit Logs on SQL Managed Instances to stream resource logs to a CSTRM Event Hub
nonComplianceMessages: The SQL Managed Instance log settings configuration doesn't meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: SQL Managed must have diagnostic settings enabled and logs must be forwarded to the approved CSTRM Event Hub.  If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
